system.description: You can create small spores of yourself. Spit on the ground and roll [quality].

outcomes.success: six creatures sprout from the ground, each the size of your thumb. They can look like anything you want, but their bodies are recognizably made from plant matter. These creatures can speak in simple phrases, carry a single object of any weight and size, and will do anything you ask them to. They disappear after they’ve carried out one task or taken 1 Harm.
outcomes.triscendence: the first six creatures you create can do any number of tasks and do not disappear until they take Harm.
outcomes.eachplus3:
choose one:
  • Sprout one additional creature.
  • Each creature may perform an additional task before disappearing.
  • The creatures can communicate one complex idea.
  • One creature may fly, swim, or climb, including while holding their object.
outcomes.failure: you die. Your body splits into 200 of these creatures, divided into at least 3 distinct factions. Each of these factions chooses a goal you will not like: they will stop at nothing to achieve this goal.
